title: Support `wait fork`
body:
This adds support of `wait fork`.

The mechanic is transformation of `wait fork` to `wait ($c("vlProcess->completedFork()"))`.
Where `completedFork` checks if all immediate descendants of a process are completed.

There's also a fix of a bug that'd emit CExpr with `;\n` postfix when targetting Verilog, this made some C++ string literals incorrect.

Closes #4465.
